content:
✔ Final Reflection Letter (Structured Lenses: Concrete, Abstract, Connecting, Exploratory)
✔ Canvas Structure (Universal for Every Week, Fully Outlined & Integrated)

🔄 Next Steps

I will now build the FINAL, FULLY INTEGRATED MACRO FRAMEWORK and present it in an exhaustive, organized structure.
• No missing sections.
• No missing assignments.
• No missing extra credit or engagement features.
• No missing interdisciplinary elements.
• Every Canvas component included.

Give me a moment to finalize this. Then, you’ll confirm it before we lock it in. 🚀
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 108 (chunk 108/108)
